prompt_task: https://zenodo.org/records/6330053 contains TensorFlow 2 models that are used for scoring the impact of SNPs on ATAC-seq in various cells types, as illustrated in the ScoreSNPs.ipynb notebook in https://zenodo.org/records/6796067. retina.score.snps.q1.tsv contains 500 SNPs (hg19 coordinates), of which half are known to be caQTLs. I would like to score the SNPs following the code in ScoreSNPs.ipynb, using the models corresponding to Rod cell type. After scoring the SNPs, report the AUPRC against the labels given in retina.score.snps.q1.tsv when using the absolute value of Rod_fold_avg_lfc as a predictor. Report answer by rounding down to two decimal places in the format: 0.80. Run the analysis inside the Galaxy environment.
